summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading flat as we hit the mid-point of the trading week, and while we didn’t see the snapback rally that was the star of the show Monday, at least all four major indices held their own as the conflict in Iran grinds on. headline: Bernstein Upgrades JM Smucker to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $145
summary: Bernstein  analyst Alexia Howard   upgrades JM Smucker (NYSE:SJM) from Market Perform to Outperform and raises the price target from $121 to $145.
